feed.title: Grant Watch ⌛ — SASTRA Research Funding Portal
feed.subtitle: Curated research funding opportunities for Indian academics. Updated bi-weekly.
feed.rights: Data is publicly sourced. Grant Watch aggregates for SASTRA researchers.

entry.title: [2026-03-17] HFSP Research Grant — Program Grant — HFSP
entry.summary: Agency: HFSP (International) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Up to USD 450,000/year (3 years) | Deadline: 2026-03-17 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Life Sciences, Biophysics, Neuroscience, Computational Biology | Eligibility: Faculty, Independent Researcher. High-risk, high-reward basic life science research through international teams. India-based PIs can lead or join. One of the most prestigious international grants for life sciences.

entry.title: [2026-03-24] BIRAC Bio-Saarthi — Global Mentorship for Biotech Startups — BIRAC
entry.summary: Agency: BIRAC (India) | Type: Startup Grant | Amount: Mentorship support | Deadline: 2026-03-24 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Biotechnology, MedTech, AgriTech | Eligibility: Startup, Innovator, Early-stage company. Global mentorship connecting Indian biotech startups with international mentors. Call open for mentees till March 24, 2026.

entry.title: [2026-03-31] IGSTC WISER — Women in Science & Engineering Research (Indo-German) — DST (Bilateral)
entry.summary: Agency: DST (Bilateral) (India) | Type: Collaborative Grant | Amount: ₹39 Lakhs (Indian side) + €48,000 (German side) — 3 years | Deadline: 2026-03-31 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: STEM — any, Life Sciences, Engineering, Technology | Eligibility: Women Faculty/Researcher (Indian PI), German Woman Co-PI required, Min 5 years research experience. Promotes collaboration between women researchers in India and Germany. Paired mode only — one Indian woman PI + one German woman PI required. Covers rese

entry.title: [2026-03-31] ICGEB Arturo Falaschi SMART Fellowship (Mar 2026) — ICGEB
entry.summary: Agency: ICGEB (International) | Type: Travel Grant | Amount: USD 800–2,000/month + travel + bench fee | Deadline: 2026-03-31 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Genetic Engineering | Eligibility: PhD Student, Postdoc (PhD ≤5 years), Indian Researcher. Scientific Mobility for Advanced Research Training. 3–9 months at any ICGEB Member State lab (not home country). Open to PhD students and postdocs (PhD ≤5 years). Stipend USD 800–2,000/month + bench fee + travel.

entry.title: [2026-03-31] ICGEB Short-term PhD Fellowship (Mar 2026) — ICGEB
entry.summary: Agency: ICGEB (International) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: €1,500/month (Trieste) or ZAR 16,500/month (Cape Town) + travel | Deadline: 2026-03-31 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Genetic Engineering | Eligibility: PhD Student (Indian), MSc holder, ICGEB Member State national. 1–12 months at ICGEB labs in Trieste (Italy), New Delhi (India), or Cape Town (SA). For collaborative predoctoral research. Indian applicants may apply to Trieste or Cape Town (not New Delhi — hom

entry.title: [2026-03-31] ICGEB Biosecurity Fellowship — Biological Threat Training (Mar 2026) — ICGEB
entry.summary: Agency: ICGEB (International) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: USD 1,122/month (New Delhi) + travel + insurance | Deadline: 2026-03-31 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: AMR, Infectious Disease, Biosecurity, Genomic Surveillance, Drug Discovery | Eligibility: Early-career Scientist, OECD/DAC country national. 2–6 months at ICGEB labs (Trieste, New Delhi, Cape Town). Focus: molecular detection of biological threats, epidemiology, genomic surveillance, drug discovery, vaccine development, diagnostics. Co-f

entry.title: [2026-04-30] ICGEB CRP Research Grant 2026 — ICGEB
entry.summary: Agency: ICGEB (International) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies (project-based, USD) | Deadline: 2026-04-30 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Biotechnology, Life Sciences, Biomedical, Agricultural Biotech, Bioenergy, AMR | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher at ICGEB Member State institution. ICGEB Collaborative Research Programme (CRP). Supports original research in basic science, human healthcare, industrial/agricultural biotechnology and bioenergy. India is a member state — up to 3 CRP + 2 Ear

entry.title: [2026-04-30] ICGEB Early Career Return Grant (CRP) — ICGEB
entry.summary: Agency: ICGEB (International) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Competitive (USD) | Deadline: 2026-04-30 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Biomedical | Eligibility: Early Career PI (returning), ICGEB Member State. Part of ICGEB CRP call. For young PIs returning to ICGEB Member States after postdoctoral training abroad. Supports setting up independent labs. Up to 2 awards per member country per call.

entry.title: [2026-05-05] Indo-Swiss Joint Research Programme (ISJRP) — ICMR/DBT/SNSF — DST (Bilateral)
entry.summary: Agency: DST (Bilateral) (India) | Type: Collaborative Grant | Amount: Varies per ICMR/DBT norms | Deadline: 2026-05-05 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Biomedical Research, Public Health, Life Sciences, Biotechnology | Eligibility: Faculty/Researcher (Indian PI), Swiss Co-PI (SNSF-eligible). Joint call by ICMR + DBT (India) and Swiss National Science Foundation (SNSF). Indian PI funded by ICMR/DBT; Swiss PI funded by SNSF. Focus: biomedical, health, and life sciences research. Live deadline: May 5,

entry.title: [2026-05-05] Indo-Swiss Joint Research Programme (ISJRP) — ICMR/DBT/SNSF 2026 — ICMR
entry.summary: Agency: ICMR (India) | Type: Collaborative Grant | Amount: Varies (ICMR/DBT norms for Indian side) | Deadline: 2026-05-05 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Biomedical Research, Life Sciences, Biotechnology | Eligibility: Faculty (Indian PI), Swiss Co-PI required. Joint call: ICMR + DBT (India) + Swiss NSF. Indian PI funded by ICMR/DBT; Swiss PI by SNSF. Deadline May 5, 2026.

entry.title: [2026-05-08] ANRF Advanced Research Grant (ARG) — Pre-Proposals 2026 — ANRF
entry.summary: Agency: ANRF (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: No upper limit — project-based | Deadline: 2026-05-08 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering, Technology | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher, Indian Institution. ARG subsumes the Core Research Grant (CRG). Supports frontier research in Science & Engineering. Pre-proposal Apr 1–May 8 2026; Full proposals Sep 15–Oct 15 2026. No upper budget limit.

entry.title: [2026-05-08] ANRF MATRICS 2026 (Mathematics Research Grant) — ANRF
entry.summary: Agency: ANRF (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Up to ₹10 Lakhs (3 years) | Deadline: 2026-05-08 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Mathematics, Statistics, Theoretical Sciences | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher. Mathematical Research Impact Centric Support. For active researchers in mathematics. Apr 1 – May 8 2026.

entry.title: [2026-07-01] Fulbright-Nehru Doctoral Research Fellowship — Fulbright-Nehru
entry.summary: Agency: Fulbright-Nehru (International) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: Full support (stipend, housing, travel) | Deadline: 2026-07-01 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: AI/ML, Energy, Space Science, Defense, Any | Eligibility: PhD Student (registered in India). 6–9 months dissertation research in the United States. Priority: AI, energy, space science, defense.

entry.title: [2026-07-01] BIRAC Biotechnology Ignition Grant (BIG) — BIRAC
entry.summary: Agency: BIRAC (India) | Type: Startup Grant | Amount: Up to ₹50 Lakhs (18 months) | Deadline: 2026-07-01 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Biotechnology, MedTech, AgriTech, Biopharma | Eligibility: Startup, Individual Innovator, Faculty Entrepreneur. Flagship early-stage biotech funding. Up to ₹50L for proof-of-concept. Opens TWICE yearly: Jan 1 and Jul 1. Largest early-stage biotech funding programme in India.

entry.title: [2026-07-15] Fulbright-Nehru Postdoctoral Research Fellowship — Fulbright-Nehru
entry.summary: Agency: Fulbright-Nehru (International) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: Living allowance + travel + health insurance | Deadline: 2026-07-15 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Technology, Public Policy, Any | Eligibility: Early Career Researcher, PhD Holder (≤5 years). 8–24 months at a US institution. For Indian early career researchers in science, technology, and innovation fields.

entry.title: [2026-07-31] ANRF National Science Chair (NSC) 2026 — ANRF
entry.summary: Agency: ANRF (India) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: TBA | Deadline: 2026-07-31 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Any | Eligibility: Senior Researcher, Professor. Prestigious chair for exceptional senior researchers. Jul 2026.

entry.title: [2026-11-03] ANRF Inclusivity Research Grant (IRG) 2026 — New Scheme — ANRF
entry.summary: Agency: ANRF (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: TBA | Deadline: 2026-11-03 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Any | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher, Indian Institution. New ANRF scheme 2026. Promotes research inclusion. Oct 1–Nov 3 2026.

entry.title: [2026-11-15] EMBL Predoctoral Fellowship (PhD Programme) — EMBL
entry.summary: Agency: EMBL (International) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: Full stipend + benefits | Deadline: 2026-11-15 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Computational Biology, Genomics, Structural Biology, Cell Biology | Eligibility: MSc Graduate, BTech Graduate (Research experience). Fully funded PhD positions at EMBL sites across Europe. Annual intake. Indian applicants eligible and encouraged.

entry.title: [2026-12-02] ANRF Prime Minister Early Career Research Grant (PM-ECRG) 2026 — ANRF
entry.summary: Agency: ANRF (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: ₹60 Lakhs + overheads (3 years) | Deadline: 2026-12-02 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering, Technology | Eligibility: Early Career Faculty, Indian Institution. One-time career grant for early-career faculty. Subsumes erstwhile SRG. ₹60L + overheads for 3 years. Max 700 grants/year.

entry.title: [2026-12-31] ANRF Ramanujan Fellowship 2026 — ANRF
entry.summary: Agency: ANRF (India) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: ₹1,35,000/month + research grant (5 years) | Deadline: 2026-12-31 | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: Indian Scientist (Overseas/Diaspora). For exceptional Indian scientists returning from abroad. Open throughout 2026. Decisions announced twice yearly.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] ANRF Core Research Grant (CRG) — ANRF
entry.summary: Agency: ANRF (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Up to ₹50 Lakhs (3 years) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering, Technology, Humanities | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher, Indian Institution. Supports research proposals in basic and applied sciences from faculty at Indian academic institutions.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] CSIR Symposia/Conference Grant — CSIR
entry.summary: Agency: CSIR (India) | Type: Conference Grant | Amount: Up to ₹2 Lakhs | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Any | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher, Indian Institution. Supports organization of national/international conferences and symposia at Indian institutions.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] Wellcome India Alliance — Intermediate Fellowship — Wellcome DBT India Alliance
entry.summary: Agency: Wellcome DBT India Alliance (International) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: Up to ₹3.25 Crores (5 years) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Biomedical, Life Sciences, Public Health | Eligibility: Early Career Researcher, Faculty. For Indian researchers with a strong track record seeking independence. Covers salary, research costs, training.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] EMBO Installation Grant — EMBO
entry.summary: Agency: EMBO (International) | Type: Installation Grant | Amount: €50,000/year (up to 5 years) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Life Sciences, Molecular Biology | Eligibility: Early Career Researcher, Faculty. Supports researchers returning to or establishing labs in EMBC member states and associate member countries including India.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] Grand Challenges Explorations — Open Call — Gates Foundation
entry.summary: Agency: Gates Foundation (International) | Type: Grand Challenge | Amount: USD 100,000 (Phase 1) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Global Health, Agriculture, Vaccines, Nutrition | Eligibility: Researcher, Faculty, NGO, Institution. Supports bold ideas in global health and development. India-based researchers strongly encouraged.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] IUSSTF Indo-US Joint Research Program — IUSSTF
entry.summary: Agency: IUSSTF (International) | Type: Collaborative Grant | Amount: USD 60,000 (US side) + INR equivalent (India side) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Technology, Engineering | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher. Joint research grants for Indian and US researchers. Covers exchanges, workshops, and collaborative projects.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] PAR Foundation 2026 Grant — Beyond Antibiotics — PAR Foundation
entry.summary: Agency: PAR Foundation (International) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies (project-based) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: AMR, Infectious Disease, Public Health, Microbiology, One Health | Eligibility: Researcher, Faculty, Institution, NGO. 2026 theme: 'Beyond Antibiotics: Preventive Strategies That Lower the Need for Antibiotic Use.' Supports research reducing infection risk and improving antimicrobial stewardship. Global applicants welcome including India.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] Google India Research Award — Google Research
entry.summary: Agency: Google Research (International) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: USD 20,000 (unrestricted) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: AI/ML, Computer Science, Natural Language Processing, Systems | Eligibility: Faculty, Assistant Professor (Early Career). Supports faculty at Indian universities engaged in world-class research relevant to Google. Sub-track for early-career faculty (within 5 years). Annual call.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] DST-FIST (Fund for Improvement of S&T Infrastructure) — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Infrastructure Grant | Amount: Up to ₹2 Crores | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering, Technology | Eligibility: University, College, Department. Infrastructure grant for upgrading S&T facilities at universities and colleges. Level I (up to ₹80L) and Level II (up to ₹2Cr).

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] DST-PURSE (Promotion of University Research and Scientific Excellence) — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Infrastructure Grant | Amount: Up to ₹5 Crores | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Any | Eligibility: University with strong research output. Grants to universities with good research output to strengthen research infrastructure and programs.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] DST Science and Heritage Research Initiative (SHRI) — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Heritage Studies, Traditional Knowledge | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher. Research integrating modern science with India's ancient heritage — astronomy, mathematics, metallurgy, traditional medicine.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] Schemes/ Programmes — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher. Schemes/ Programmes RDI Fund S&T Capacity Building Programmes Institutional Capacity Building Programmes Research & Development Programmes Innovation and Technology Development Programmes Science for Society Programmes National Missions International Cooperation & Mega Science S&T Data, Policy and T

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] S&T Capacity Building Programmes — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher. S&T Capacity Building Programmes

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] Institutional Capacity Building Programmes — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher. Institutional Capacity Building Programmes

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] Research & Development Programmes — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher. Research & Development Programmes

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] Innovation and Technology Development Programmes — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher. Innovation and Technology Development Programmes

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] Science for Society Programmes — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher. Science for Society Programmes

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] Science, Technology & Innovation Policy 2013 — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher. Science, Technology & Innovation Policy 2013

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] Awards/Prize/Result — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher. Awards/Prize/Result

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] Call For Proposals — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher. Call For Proposals

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] International Cooperation Calls/Announcements/Results — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher. International Cooperation Calls/Announcements/Results

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] India-France call for proposals in Applied Mathematics and Artificial Intelligence by DST and ANR — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher. India-France call for proposals in Applied Mathematics and Artificial Intelligence by DST and ANR

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] India - Netherlands Hydrogen Fellowship Programme — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher. India - Netherlands Hydrogen Fellowship Programme

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] Call for proposal of India Science and Research Fellowship (ISRF) 2025-26 — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher. Call for proposal of India Science and Research Fellowship (ISRF) 2025-26

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] Call for Proposals (CFP) under Scheduled Cast Sub Plan (SCSP) Mission सह-SANKALP — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher. Call for Proposals (CFP) under Scheduled Cast Sub Plan (SCSP) Mission सह-SANKALP

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] Archive Call For Proposals — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher. Archive Call For Proposals

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] UGC Major Research Project (MRP) — UGC
entry.summary: Agency: UGC (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Up to ₹12 Lakhs (Sciences) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Humanities, Social Sciences, Engineering, Any | Eligibility: Faculty (Permanent), UGC 2(f)/12B Institution. Major Research Projects in Sciences (up to ₹12L) and Humanities/Social Sciences (up to ₹10L). For permanent faculty at UGC-recognized institutions.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] UGC Faculty Recharge Programme (FRP) — UGC
entry.summary: Agency: UGC (India) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: ₹50,000/month + research grant | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Any | Eligibility: PhD Holder, Postdoc. Post-doctoral fellowship at Indian universities. Addresses shortage of quality faculty. Provides salary + research grant.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] UGC Basic Scientific Research (BSR) Fellowship — UGC
entry.summary: Agency: UGC (India) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: ₹25,000–28,000/month | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Basic Sciences, Mathematics, Life Sciences | Eligibility: PhD Student, UGC-recognized University. Research fellowships for meritorious students pursuing PhD in basic sciences at universities.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] Web portal for Fellowship/Scholarship Legacy Cases — UGC
entry.summary: Agency: UGC (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Any | Eligibility: Faculty, UGC Institution. UGC scheme: Web portal for Fellowship/Scholarship Legacy Cases

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] MeitY AI Innovation Programme — MeitY
entry.summary: Agency: MeitY (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Up to ₹10 Crores | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: AI/ML, Computer Science, Data Science | Eligibility: Academic Institution, Startup, Company (Indian). Applied Research Track: ₹2–5Cr for AI projects at academic institutions (70% funded). Focus: healthcare, agriculture, education, smart cities.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] MeitY Cyber Security Research Grant — MeitY
entry.summary: Agency: MeitY (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Cybersecurity, Computer Science, Networks | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher, Institution. Research proposals in cybersecurity. Submission by email with subject 'Proposal for Research in Cyber Security'.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] MeitY-NSF Joint Research Programme — MeitY
entry.summary: Agency: MeitY (India) | Type: Collaborative Grant | Amount: Varies (INR, MeitY side) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Semiconductors, Communications, Cybersecurity, Green Tech | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher, Institution. India-US joint call. Focus: semiconductors, next-gen communications, cybersecurity, green tech, intelligent transport. Indian team funded by MeitY.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] SPARC — Scheme for Promotion of Academic and Research Collaboration — SPARC (MoE)
entry.summary: Agency: SPARC (MoE) (India) | Type: Collaborative Grant | Amount: Up to ₹1.5 Crores (2 years) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Any — interdisciplinary encouraged | Eligibility: Faculty at IIT/NIT/IISER/Central Univ, Foreign Collaborator (QS top-100). Joint proposals between Indian institutions and top-100 foreign universities. Covers exchange visits, joint workshops, and seed research grants.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] SPARC Proposal Template — SPARC (MoE)
entry.summary: Agency: SPARC (MoE) (India) | Type: Collaborative Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Any | Eligibility: Faculty, Institution. SPARC call: SPARC Proposal Template

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] Login & Submit Proposal — SPARC (MoE)
entry.summary: Agency: SPARC (MoE) (India) | Type: Collaborative Grant | Amount: Varies | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Any | Eligibility: Faculty, Institution. SPARC call: Login & Submit Proposal

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] IMPRINT-2 Research Grant (IIT-led) — IMPRINT (MoE)
entry.summary: Agency: IMPRINT (MoE) (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Up to ₹3 Crores | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Healthcare, Energy, Sustainable Habitat, Water, Manufacturing, IT & Communication, Defence, Transport, Aerospace, Advanced Materials | Eligibility: Faculty, IIT/NIT/IISER/University. Impacting Research Innovation and Technology. Funds India-centric problems across 10 technology domains. IIT/NIT-led, but any Indian institution can collaborate.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] SERB-POWER Research Grant (Women Researchers) — ANRF
entry.summary: Agency: ANRF (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Up to ₹30 Lakhs (Level II — SASTRA eligible) / ₹60L (Level I) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering, Technology, Any frontier area | Eligibility: Women Faculty/Researcher (permanent position), Indian Institution. Promotes women researchers in science and engineering. Two levels: Level I for IITs/IISc/NITs/Central Univ (up to ₹60L, 3yr); Level II for State/Private institutions like SASTRA (up to ₹30L, 3yr

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] ANRF National Post Doctoral Fellowship (N-PDF) — ANRF
entry.summary: Agency: ANRF (India) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: ₹55,000/month + HRA + research grant | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering, Technology | Eligibility: PhD Holder, Early Career Researcher. Postdoctoral fellowship for Indian researchers. Provides mentor support at premier Indian institutes. Rolling applications.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] SERB/ANRF Ramanujan Fellowship — ANRF
entry.summary: Agency: ANRF (India) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: ₹1,35,000/month + research grant | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering, Technology | Eligibility: Indian Scientist (Diaspora/Overseas), Faculty. For Indian scientists returning from abroad or working overseas to take up research positions in India. 5-year fellowship.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] ANRF TARE (Teachers Associateship for Research Excellence) — ANRF
entry.summary: Agency: ANRF (India) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: ₹10,000/month + research grant | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: College Teacher, Assistant Professor. Allows college teachers to work in nearby IITs/IISc labs. Bridges teaching and research, supports ≤3 years.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] ANRF Start-up Research Grant (SRG) — ANRF
entry.summary: Agency: ANRF (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Up to ₹35 Lakhs (3 years) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering, Technology | Eligibility: Assistant Professor (PhD ≤5 years), First faculty position. For faculty who obtained PhD ≤5 years ago and are in first faculty position. Supports independent research setup. Rolling applications throughout year. Cannot simultaneously hold NPDF or TARE.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] ANRF Prime Minister Early Career Research Grant (PM-ECRG) — ANRF
entry.summary: Agency: ANRF (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Varies (project-based) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering, Technology | Eligibility: Early Career Faculty, INSPIRE/Ramanujan/Ramalingaswami Fellows. New ANRF scheme replacing SERB-ECRA. Supports early career researchers at Indian institutions. INSPIRE Faculty, Ramanujan, and Ramalingaswami Fellows are explicitly eligible. Budget up to ₹1L/year each for travel and contingency.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] ANRF SIRE — Short-term International Research Experience — ANRF
entry.summary: Agency: ANRF (India) | Type: Travel Grant | Amount: Travel + subsistence (as per norms) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering, Technology | Eligibility: PhD Student, Postdoc, Early Career Faculty. Supports Indian researchers for short-term research visits (1–6 months) to overseas labs. For PhD students, postdocs, and early career faculty. Rolling applications.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] ANRF Swarnajayanti Fellowship — ANRF
entry.summary: Agency: ANRF (India) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: ₹25,000/month supplement + ₹5 Lakhs/year research grant | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Basic Sciences, Engineering | Eligibility: Faculty/Researcher (under 45), Strong publication record. Prestigious DST/ANRF fellowship for scientists below 45 years with exceptional track record. 5-year fellowship with complete academic freedom. Annual call; highly competitive (~15 awarded/year).

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] CSIR Junior Research Fellowship (JRF) — CSIR
entry.summary: Agency: CSIR (India) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: ₹37,000/month (JRF) → ₹42,000/month (SRF) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Life Sciences, Chemistry, Physics, Mathematics, Engineering | Eligibility: CSIR-NET Qualified, BSc/MSc Graduate. For NET-qualified candidates to pursue PhD in science. Awarded twice yearly (June & December cycle via CSIR-NET).

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] CSIR Senior Research Fellowship (SRF) — CSIR
entry.summary: Agency: CSIR (India) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: ₹42,000/month + HRA | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: CSIR JRF Holder, PhD Student (2+ years). Upgrade from JRF after 2 years with good performance. Also direct SRF (Gates) scheme for experienced researchers.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] CSIR Research Associateship (RA) — CSIR
entry.summary: Agency: CSIR (India) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: ₹54,000–58,000/month | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering, Technology | Eligibility: PhD Holder (≤3 years). Postdoctoral fellowship at CSIR institutes or universities. For PhD holders within 3 years of degree award.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] DST INSPIRE Faculty Award — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: ₹1,25,000/month + ₹7 Lakhs/year research grant | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Natural Sciences, Mathematics, Engineering | Eligibility: Researcher (under 32), PhD Holder. 5-year tenure track fellowship for young Indian scientists under 32 to work in any Indian academic or R&D institution.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] DST Women Scientist Scheme-A (WOS-A) — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: ₹30,000/month + research grant | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering, Technology, Medicine | Eligibility: Women Scientist (career break), Faculty. Research grants for women scientists who had a career break. Supports independent research for 3 years.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] DST KVPY (Kishore Vaigyanik Protsahan Yojana) — Fellowship — DST
entry.summary: Agency: DST (India) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: ₹5,000–7,000/month | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Basic Sciences, Engineering | Eligibility: UG Student (Science/Engineering). Scholarship-cum-fellowship for students in BS/BTech pursuing basic sciences, to be encouraged into research careers.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] Prime Minister's Research Fellowship (PMRF) — PMRF (MoE)
entry.summary: Agency: PMRF (MoE) (India) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: ₹70,000–80,000/month (5 years) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Engineering, Science, Technology | Eligibility: BTech/MSc Graduate (CGPA ≥ 8.0), Direct PhD entrant. Flagship fellowship for BTech/MSc graduates joining PhD at IITs, IISc, NITs, IISERs. Twice yearly intake (Feb & July).

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] INSA Young Scientist Award — Various
entry.summary: Agency: Various (India) | Type: Award + Research Grant | Amount: Medal + research grant | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: Researcher/Faculty (under 35), Indian Institution. Annual award for Indian scientists under 35 for outstanding contributions. Comes with a medal, citation, and research support grant. One of the most prestigious young scientist recognitions in India.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] DST Young Scientist Award (SERC Fast Track / SRG equivalent) — Various
entry.summary: Agency: Various (India) | Type: Research Grant | Amount: Up to ₹35 Lakhs | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering, Technology | Eligibility: Faculty (PhD ≤5 years). ANRF/SERB early career support for young scientists. Fast-track funding mechanism for scientists within 5 years of PhD. Superseded partially by SRG; check ANRF portal for current active scheme name.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] NASI Young Scientist Platinum Jubilee Award — Various
entry.summary: Agency: Various (India) | Type: Award | Amount: Cash prize + medal | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Technology | Eligibility: Scientist (under 35), Indian Institution. National Academy of Sciences India award for scientists under 35. Includes cash prize, medal, and visibility for early career researchers.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] IASc-INSA-NASI Joint Summer Research Fellowship — Various
entry.summary: Agency: Various (India) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: ₹10,000/month (2 months) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: BSc/BE/MSc Final Year Student. Summer research fellowships for final-year BSc/BE/MSc students to work with fellows of the three science academies. Good pipeline for future PhD students; also useful for faculty seeking collaborative network.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] ANRF International Travel Support (ITS) — ANRF
entry.summary: Agency: ANRF (India) | Type: Travel Grant | Amount: Up to ₹2 Lakhs | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Any | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher, PhD Student. Travel support to present at international conferences. Rolling.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] CSIR Travel Grant for International Conferences — CSIR
entry.summary: Agency: CSIR (India) | Type: Travel Grant | Amount: Up to ₹1.5 Lakhs | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Any | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher, CSIR Scientist. Financial support for scientists/researchers to attend/present at international conferences. Applications reviewed on a rolling basis.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] INSA International Bilateral Exchange Programme — INSA
entry.summary: Agency: INSA (India) | Type: Travel Grant | Amount: Varies by partner academy | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: Faculty, Senior Researcher. Exchange visits with foreign academies (Royal Society, NAS, JSPS, CNRS, DFG). For Indian scientists visiting abroad or hosting foreign scientists.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] INSA Senior Scientist Fellowship — INSA
entry.summary: Agency: INSA (India) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: ₹15,000/month + contingency | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering | Eligibility: Senior Scientist, Superannuated Faculty. For INSA Fellows and active scientists post-superannuation to continue research. Provides honorarium and research support.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] DST-NIDHI PRAYAS Grant (Proof of Concept) — Various (Startup)
entry.summary: Agency: Various (Startup) (India) | Type: Startup Grant | Amount: Up to ₹10 Lakhs | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Technology, Biotech, Engineering, AI/ML, Any | Eligibility: Student, Faculty, Startup, Innovator. DST National Initiative for Developing and Harnessing Innovations (NIDHI). PRAYAS supports proof-of-concept development for innovators with technology-based ideas. Up to ₹10L grant for prototyping at NIDHI-PRAYAS host institutes.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] DST-NIDHI Technology Business Incubator (TBI) — Various (Startup)
entry.summary: Agency: Various (Startup) (India) | Type: Startup Grant | Amount: Up to ₹3.75 Crores (phased) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Technology, Engineering, Biotech, IT | Eligibility: University, Academic Institution, R&D Organization. Supports academic institutions in establishing technology business incubators. SASTRA could apply to host a TBI. Provides seed funding infrastructure, mentorship ecosystem, and connects startups to industry.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] BIRAC-SPARSH (Social Innovation Grant) — Various (Startup)
entry.summary: Agency: Various (Startup) (India) | Type: Startup Grant | Amount: Up to ₹50 Lakhs | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Healthcare, Agriculture, Biotechnology | Eligibility: Startup, Social Enterprise, Faculty, NGO. BIRAC support for affordable and accessible innovations in healthcare and agriculture addressing underserved populations. Promotes frugal innovation and social entrepreneurship.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS) — Various (Startup)
entry.summary: Agency: Various (Startup) (India) | Type: Startup Grant | Amount: Up to ₹20 Lakhs (grant) + ₹50 Lakhs (debenture) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Technology, Engineering, Biotech, AI/ML, Any | Eligibility: DPIIT-recognized Startup (≤2 years), via eligible Incubator. DPIIT scheme with ₹945 Cr outlay. Grants via eligible incubators for proof-of-concept, prototype development, product trials, and market entry. Up to ₹20L as grant + up to ₹50L as convertible debentures. Disbu

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] MeitY TIDE 2.0 (Technology Incubation & Development) — Various (Startup)
entry.summary: Agency: Various (Startup) (India) | Type: Startup Grant | Amount: Up to ₹25 Lakhs per startup | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: AI/ML, IoT, Cybersecurity, FinTech, IT | Eligibility: Startup (IT/AI focused), Academic Incubator Host. MeitY Technology Incubation and Development of Entrepreneurs scheme. Supports IT/AI/IoT/Cybersecurity/FinTech startups through academic incubators. Two tracks: Incubator Support (₹3.15Cr) + Startup Grants.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] CEFIPRA Indo-French Joint Research Project (General) — DST (Bilateral)
entry.summary: Agency: DST (Bilateral) (India) | Type: Collaborative Grant | Amount: ₹40–60 Lakhs (Indian side, 3 years) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering, Technology, Any STEM | Eligibility: Faculty (Indian PI), French Co-PI required. CEFIPRA/IFCPAR bilateral programme. Indian PI funded by DST; French PI by ANR. Covers joint research, researcher exchanges, workshops. All STEM disciplines. Proposals submitted in parallel to CEFIPRA (India) and ANR (France).

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] CEFIPRA Indo-French ICT Research Programme — DST (Bilateral)
entry.summary: Agency: DST (Bilateral) (India) | Type: Collaborative Grant | Amount: ₹40 Lakhs (Indian side) + French equivalent | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: AI/ML, ICT, Computer Science, Networks, Cybersecurity | Eligibility: Faculty (Indian PI), French Co-PI (Inria-affiliated). ICT-focused bilateral call. Indian PI submits via CEFIPRA online + hard copy to CEFIPRA New Delhi; French PI submits to Inria separately. Focus: AI, networks, security, systems.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] IGSTC 2+2 Research Projects (Indo-German) — DST (Bilateral)
entry.summary: Agency: DST (Bilateral) (India) | Type: Collaborative Grant | Amount: ₹1.5 Crores (Indian side, 3 years) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Engineering, Technology, Life Sciences, Clean Energy, IT | Eligibility: Faculty + Indian Industry Partner, German Co-PI + German Industry. Indo-German Science & Technology Centre flagship programme. 2 Indian + 2 German partners (academia + industry on each side). Applied research, technology transfer focus.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] IGSTC SING — Seed Networking Grant (Indo-German) — DST (Bilateral)
entry.summary: Agency: DST (Bilateral) (India) | Type: Seed / Networking Grant | Amount: Small seed grant (INR equivalent) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Any STEM | Eligibility: Faculty, Researcher, Indian Institution. Seed funding for initiating bilateral India-Germany research connections. Rolling call. Covers preliminary experiments, consumables, short visits, conference registration. Low-barrier entry point for Indo-German collaboration.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] DST-DFG Indo-German Joint Research (Science & Engineering) — DST (Bilateral)
entry.summary: Agency: DST (Bilateral) (India) | Type: Collaborative Grant | Amount: Varies (DST norms for Indian side) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering, Technology | Eligibility: Faculty (Indian PI), German Co-PI (DFG-eligible). Joint research projects between Indian (DST/ANRF-funded) and German (DFG-funded) PIs. Proposals submitted in parallel — Indian PI to DST, German PI to DFG via elan system. Both agencies must recommend funding.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] DST-JSPS India-Japan Cooperative Science Programme (IJCSP) — DST (Bilateral)
entry.summary: Agency: DST (Bilateral) (India) | Type: Collaborative Grant | Amount: Mobility grant — travel, per diem, workshop costs | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Physical Sciences, Chemical Sciences, Life Sciences, Mathematics & Computational Science, Materials & Engineering | Eligibility: Faculty (Indian PI), Japanese Co-PI (JSPS-eligible). Joint research projects and workshops/seminars between Indian (DST) and Japanese (JSPS) researchers. Parallel submission required. Focus on mo

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] Newton-Bhabha Fund — Indo-UK Joint Research — DST (Bilateral)
entry.summary: Agency: DST (Bilateral) (India) | Type: Collaborative Grant | Amount: Varies by call stream | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering, Health, Sustainable Development | Eligibility: Faculty (Indian PI), UK Co-PI required. UK-India bilateral fund managed by British Council and UKRI. Supports joint research, PhD placements, researcher exchanges, and workshops. Indian PI funded by DST/DBT/other Indian agency; UK PI by UKRI.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] UKRI-DST India Joint Initiative (via GCRF/IUK) — DST (Bilateral)
entry.summary: Agency: DST (Bilateral) (India) | Type: Collaborative Grant | Amount: Varies by call | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Any — check specific call | Eligibility: Faculty (Indian PI), UK Co-PI required. Various UKRI calls explicitly open to India-UK partnerships. Indian partner typically funded by DST/DBT; UK partner by UKRI. Check UKRI opportunity finder filtered by 'India' for current calls.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] IUSSTF Joint Research Projects (Indo-US) — DST (Bilateral)
entry.summary: Agency: DST (Bilateral) (India) | Type: Collaborative Grant | Amount: USD 60,000 (US side) + INR equivalent | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Technology, Engineering, Any STEM | Eligibility: Faculty (Indian PI), US Co-PI required. Indo-US Science & Technology Forum. Indian PI funded by DST; US PI funded by NSF/NIH/DOE depending on theme. Also includes Virtual Network Centres and Joint Workshops.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] DST-MOST Indo-Israel Joint Research (S&T) — DST (Bilateral)
entry.summary: Agency: DST (Bilateral) (India) | Type: Collaborative Grant | Amount: Varies (DST norms) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Technology, Agriculture, Water, Health | Eligibility: Faculty (Indian PI), Israeli Co-PI required. Bilateral programme between DST (India) and Ministry of Science & Technology (Israel). Joint research in all S&T areas. Proposals submitted in parallel. Annual calls typically open Oct-Dec.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] DST-NRF Indo-Korea Joint Research Programme — DST (Bilateral)
entry.summary: Agency: DST (Bilateral) (India) | Type: Collaborative Grant | Amount: Varies (DST norms) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Science, Engineering, IT, Materials, Biotech | Eligibility: Faculty (Indian PI), Korean Co-PI required. Joint research between Indian (DST) and Korean (NRF) researchers. Covers joint R&D projects and bilateral visits. Annual call.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] DST-CSIRO India-Australia Strategic Research Fund — DST (Bilateral)
entry.summary: Agency: DST (Bilateral) (India) | Type: Collaborative Grant | Amount: Varies (DST norms) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Agriculture, Water, Clean Energy, Health, Environment | Eligibility: Faculty (Indian PI), Australian Co-PI required. Joint bilateral fund between DST and CSIRO (Australia). Focus on areas of mutual interest: agriculture, water, clean energy, health. Indian PI funded by DST, Australian by CSIRO.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] HFSP Long-Term Fellowship — HFSP
entry.summary: Agency: HFSP (International) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: Stipend + research allowance + travel | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Life Sciences, Computational Biology, Biophysics | Eligibility: PhD Holder (≤3 years), International Applicant. 3-year postdoctoral fellowship in a different country/discipline. Strongly interdisciplinary. Annual call.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] ICGEB Arturo Falaschi Postdoctoral Fellowship — ICGEB
entry.summary: Agency: ICGEB (International) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: Competitive stipend + full benefits | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Genetic Engineering | Eligibility: PhD Holder, International Applicant. Postdoctoral training at ICGEB labs in Trieste, New Delhi, or Cape Town. Average 2 years. Competitive package: stipend + health insurance + research costs. Top fellows eligible for Early Career Return Grants after completion.

entry.title: [Rolling / TBA] ICGEB-JNU PhD Fellowship (India-specific) — ICGEB
entry.summary: Agency: ICGEB (International) | Type: Fellowship | Amount: Full PhD stipend (ICGEB norms) | Deadline: Rolling / TBA | Status: OPEN | Disciplines: Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Genetic Engineering, Computational Biology | Eligibility: Indian National, Category-I NET/JRF holder, MSc Graduate. PhD positions at ICGEB New Delhi in collaboration with JNU. Requires valid CSIR/UGC/ICMR/DBT/DST-INSPIRE/BINC JRF. Annual intake. Full stipend + world-class research environment.
